Table summary.
Document: Responsibility Matrix. Purpose: Clarify ownership among Treasurer, Bookkeeper, committees, Pastor, Deacons, and Congregation.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Bylaw Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Pastor, Deacons, Nominating Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Treasurer vs. Bookkeeper Duty Split. Purpose: Define which duties belong to Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Finance, Personnel, and outside vendors.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Bookkeeper Job Description. Purpose: Define the authorized paid Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator role.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Finance Review. Review Needed By: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Reimbursement Policy. Purpose: Define routine reimbursements, documentation, exceptions, and pre-approval triggers.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Spending Authority Policy. Purpose: Define thresholds and approval paths for budgeted, over-budget, outside-budget, emergency, and major spending.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Bylaw Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Credit Card Policy. Purpose: Define cardholder eligibility, limits, receipt rules, and monthly review.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Pastor. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Software Requirements. Purpose: Define requirements before demos or purchase.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: IconCMO vs. ChurchTrac Comparison. Purpose: Compare candidate systems after vendor claims are confirmed.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.

Section: 6. Documents Needing Personnel Committee Input.

Table summary.
Document: Bookkeeper Hiring Process. Purpose: Provide hiring checklist, interview guide, reference questions, and candidate rubric.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel Review. Review Needed By: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Pastor. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Bookkeeper Application. Purpose: Provide draft application questions and applicant acknowledgment language.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel Review. Review Needed By: Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Job Description Consistency Check. Purpose: Compare the Bookkeeper job description with prior KBC job-description patterns.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel Review. Review Needed By: Personnel Committee. Priority: Medium. Link: Open.
Document: Personnel Committee Role. Purpose: Clarify Personnel's responsibilities in finance-related staffing without taking over Finance decisions.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel Review. Review Needed By: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Priority: Medium. Link: Open.
Document: Personnel Committee Recommendation. Purpose: Draft request from Personnel to Finance for financial-duty direction.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel Review. Review Needed By: Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.

Section: 7. Documents Needing Bylaw Or Church Approval Review.
